name: Banana Fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together flour, curry powder, and soy sauce; coat bananas and fish with this mixture.
2. Set aside the coated ingredients.
3. Heat oil in a skillet.
4. Stir-fry celery until crisp; set aside.
5. Add butter to the oil; sauté bananas until golden, about 1 minute on each side.
6. Sprinkle bananas with half of the lemon juice and remove them to a serving dish.
7. Sauté fish in the oil/butter mixture until it comes away easily from a fork, about 3 minutes on each side.
8. Sprinkle remaining lemon juice over the fish.
9. Place fish on the serving dish with the bananas.
10. Spoon celery over the fish.
